privacyPolicy.disclaimer: Your privacy is our priority. All information provided is used solely for opportunity mapping and resource identification. Data is not sold to third parties and is regularly purged from our active systems to ensure security.
privacyPolicy.anonymityNote: Standard onboarding uses your legal name and email. If you are in an unsafe situation or require total privacy, please use the 'Secret Code Name' (Alias) option. For anonymous users, your completed report will be uploaded to the public archive indexed by your alias.

fields.name: realname

fields.hint: Your legal name. Skip if you want to stay anonymous.

fields.hint: Pick a unique codeword (e.g. wolfpack47). Required for all users.
